summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. Five open non-security PRs had hydrated live state and are kept independent for later proof/review because this is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix actions are blocked. One hydrated PR is routed to central security handling. Nineteen refs could not be hydrated due GitHub API rate limits, so each unresolved item is scoped to needs_human with no mutating action.

actions.reason: Independent open PR requiring proof/review, not eligible for closure or merge in this plan shard.
Independent build-fix PR with unresolved proof/review gates; no close or merge action is safe.
Independent provider catalog PR needing proof; no canonical or duplicate relationship is established.
Independent CLI build metadata PR; linked issue is evidence only and no mutating action is allowed.
Broad independent agents/session-state PR requiring maintainer proof review, not closeout.
Security-sensitive target is out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
